#  Delete Budgeted Labor Hours and Budgeted Production Quantities 
##  Background 
If you want to delete budgeted labor hours and budgeted production quantities from the Unit Quantity Based Budget page, the steps you use will depend upon whether the project's Budget tool is enabled.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/permissions)
  * If you have Procore Financials and use the 'Procore Labor Productivity Cost' budget view, deleting production quantities will immediately update your budget.


##  Prerequisites 
  * If the Budget tool is enabled, users will need to first delete labor hours from the budget by deleting its corresponding budget line items. See [Delete a Budget Line Item](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/delete-a-budget-line-item).


##  Steps 
  * Budget Tool is Disabled
  * Budget Tool is Enabled


### Budget Tool is Disabled
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under 'Project Settings', click **Unit Quantity Based Budget.**
  3. Locate the line item of budgeted labor hours and production quantities you want to delete.
  4. Hover to the far right of the line item to display the **delete** ![Icon Delete Trash](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/516e54ea0aa4258758d529172871e38f/b443eda53f8791b9421fb3aad5dee970/icon-delete-trash.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.  
![Delete Timesheet Quantities From Admin](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d423bf058a7ad8721fc02c195383d19a/584cf59a713768446333994855ce0060/delete-timesheet-quantities-from-admin.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click the **delete**![Icon Delete Trash](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/516e54ea0aa4258758d529172871e38f/b443eda53f8791b9421fb3aad5dee970/icon-delete-trash.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  6. Select one of the following options:
     * **Delete Labor Hours**
     * **Delete Production Quantities**
     * **Delete Both**.


### Budget Tool is Enabled
_Note:_ You can only update or delete Labor Hours from the Budget tool.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Budget** tool.
  2. Click the **Delete** icon for each line item that you want to delete.  
![Delete Budget Line Item](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a1b41e8cc62971782f8d3c71a8bbc12f/be824c61034f0a057b38b71355ec3a81/delete-budget-line-item.jpg?fm=webp)
  3. Verify that the subtotal amounts were updated appropriately.


## See Also

  * [Import a Unit Quantity Based Budget](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/tutorials/import-a-unit-quantity-based-budget)
